name: clerk
description: An agentic conductor for copier. The clerk fills in the paperwork (per-module answer files); copier makes the copies. Reproduce is agent-free. This apm.yml declares the project-scoped agentic layer used to BUILD clerk (spec-driven workflow, structure/toolchain steering, dependency + secret scanning). The global layer provides the always-on packages (coder, challenger, verify, sniff, debate, handover, etc.).
